name: create_material_and_assign
description: Create a templated material, optionally assign it to an object, and optionally mark it as an asset.

object_name.description: Optional target object name for immediate assignment.

slot_index.description: Optional material slot index for assignment.

mark_as_asset.description: Whether to mark the created material as an asset after creation.

description.description: Optional asset description used when mark_as_asset is true.

author.description: Optional asset author used when mark_as_asset is true.

tags.description: Optional asset tags used when mark_as_asset is true.

base_color.description: Optional RGBA color override as [r, g, b, a].

roughness.description: Optional roughness override in the 0-1 range.

metallic.description: Optional metallic override in the 0-1 range.

transmission.description: Optional transmission override in the 0-1 range.

emission_color.description: Optional emission color override as [r, g, b, a].

alpha.description: Optional alpha override in the 0-1 range.

returns.description: Workflow summary containing the created material plus optional assignment and asset-marking results.
